## Problem
What problem should this feature solve?

## Suggested Solution
Describe the feature you want.

## Affected Area
- [ ] Save Editor
- [ ] Profile Scanner
- [ ] Mod Profile Manager
- [ ] Steam Workshop
- [ ] UI / UX
- [ ] i18n / Languages
- [ ] Installer / Updater
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Why is this useful?
Explain why this matters for users.

## Example / Reference
Add screenshots, links or examples if possible.

## Priority
- [ ] Critical
- [ ] High
- [ ] Normal
- [ ] Later
